project_type: Shopify theme (Dawn-based) - adding a completely independent mega-navigation section with premium Symmetry-like features
build_system: None - Shopify theme files are uploaded directly via admin code editor. No compile step.
test_framework: None - validation is done via JSON schema parsing, Liquid tag-balance counts, range-math checks, and setting usage greps against the source files.
build_command: None (no local build). Validation: python3 validate-mega-nav.py on the 5 target files.
verification_instructions: Run the validation script. It checks: (1) schema JSON validity, (2) mn_ setting count in range 35-50, (3) all ranges pass (max-min)/step <= 100 AND (default-min) % step == 0, (4) liquid block balance, (5) all mn_ settings referenced at least once in body+css+js, (6) no bareword null in liquid, (7) no width=auto, (8) no trailing commas in JSON, (9) render tags only pass primitives, (10) snippets use linklists[handle] pattern.
setup_instructions: No setup needed. Working directory is /projects/sandbox/Render. Files to create: sections/mega-navigation.liquid, assets/mega-navigation.css, assets/mega-navigation.js, snippets/mega-nav-column.liquid, snippets/mega-nav-promo.liquid.
environment_constraints: Network mode: COMMON_DEPENDENCIES. No Shopify CLI available. No Docker needed. Validation is pure Python3 (pre-installed). Files are standalone Shopify theme files.
contribution_requirements: From user's Senior Shopify Developer master prompt: (1) range math (max-min)/step <= 100 AND (default-min)%step == 0, all numeric not strings; (2) plain English labels only (no t: keys for new mn_ settings); (3) JSON validity (no trailing commas, no comments); (4) no null in Liquid (use nil); (5) no width=auto in HTML; (6) no emojis in schema headers; (7) no tag:section or class: in schema root; (8) range step must be integer; (9) render cannot pass full objects - pass individual primitives only; (10) linklists[handle] lookup in snippets, not full linklist object; (11) Liquid block balance; (12) color picker never returns blank - use checkbox gate pattern for per-item color overrides; (13) SVGs must have xmlns attribute; (14) mn_ prefix on all new settings.
key_patterns: Existing premium header pattern (hp_ prefix): master toggle gates everything, CSS file + JS file conditionally loaded. CSS uses custom properties (--hp-*) and data attribute selectors. JS wraps in IIFE, handles Shopify editor events. Schema blocks for per-item customization. For the new mega-nav: use mn_ prefix, same IIFE pattern in JS, CSS scoped to .mega-navigation class, section is completely independent of header.liquid.
relevant_files: reference:sections/header.liquid - existing premium header to study patterns (1370 lines)
directory_structure: Workspace root: /projects/sandbox/Render. sections/ has header.liquid. assets/ has header-premium.css, header-premium.js. snippets/ directory does not exist yet (must be created). The mega-navigation section sits below the header in Shopify Customizer - it is a completely separate section file.
